name: GoalOS Signoff Pro — Until-DONE Mission Control Lab

scenarios.label: AI research acceptance
scenarios.objective: Move one AI research deliverable from persuasive draft to review-ready governed decision state.
scenarios.decision: Accept, request changes, reject, or escalate the research deliverable.

scenarios.label: Software delivery review
scenarios.objective: Convert a delivered software milestone into evidence, tests, risk state, receipt, and safe next action.
scenarios.decision: Approve milestone, request fixes, hold release, or escalate review.

scenarios.label: Vendor proof room
scenarios.objective: Turn vendor claims into inspectable evidence before procurement acceptance.
scenarios.decision: Accept vendor package, request clarifications, reject claim, or escalate diligence.

scenarios.label: Safety escalation package
scenarios.objective: Create a decision state around a high-impact AI output while preserving human authority.
scenarios.decision: Hold, escalate, approve bounded next action, or reject unsupported claim.
